===Pokémon: Paldean Winds===
[[File:Nemona Paldean Winds.png|250px|thumb|left|Nemona in Pokémon: Paldean Winds]]
Nemona first appeared in ''[[PPW01|Breathe Out]]''. Nemona was first seen being watched by [[Aliquis]] as she taught some children the concept of {{Tera}}stallization. Later, during [[Ohara]]'s performance, she was seen attending the concert with [[Naranja Academy]]'s academic staff. During the events of the episode, it was revealed that Nemona had a battle to wage against Aliquis.

In ''[[PPW02|Breathe In]]'', Nemona defeated Aliquis in battle, some time later, Nemona had a new battle against her rival, this time a [[Full Battle]]. Initially, Nemona was winning again, but the battle scenario changed when Aliquis made peace with his {{TP|Aliquis|Meowscarada}}, upon seeing Aliquis's determination, Nemona decided to continue the battle with each of the Trainers Terastallizing their Pokémon. With new determination, the battle between Nemona and Aliquis continued.

In ''[[PPW03|Take a Breath]]'', it was revealed that Nemona managed to beat Aliquis in the last battle, thus achieving a score of three victories against her biggest rival in the Academy.

In ''[[PPW04|Breathe Together]]'', during the presentation of Naranja Academy's introduction video for new students, Nemona appeared presenting a talk to some students and then to the rest of the Academy's student body.

====Character====
Just like her game counterpart, Nemona is an avid battler. She also has a legion of fans at the Naranja Academy, which gained even more strength when she became a [[Champion]].
